description: Configure a new Transactional Document Type for web-based sales. Create a sequence named 'Web_Sales_Seq_2025' with a Start No of 900000, Increment of 1, and Current Next of 900000. Create a Document Type named 'Web Standard Order' with GL Category 'Sales', Document Base Type 'Sales Order', and Sales Order Sub Type 'Standard Order', assigned to the 'Web_Sales_Seq_2025' sequence.
